steps.title: Compare the listed years
steps.content: The answer choices are $2012$, $2013$, $2014$, and $2015$, so compare only those four points on the line graph.

steps.title: Choose the lowest point
steps.content: Among those four years, the point for $2014$ is the lowest on the graph. That year has the smallest percent of cars for sale. The answer is C.
